creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
A great idea, thank you. 

I checked the manual page for syslog.conf(5), there's no mention of freebsd-update(8). 

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=syslog.conf&sektion=5&manpath=FreeBSD>

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=freebsd-update&sektion=8&manpath=FreeBSD>

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/config/#_configuring_local_logging>
<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/handbook/book/#_configuring_local_logging>
